subcodes.first_line: The winds of destiny have scattered abroad the loved ones of God, the Most Exalted, the All-Glorious, and among them are those in Mosul, the curved city, and among them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تفرقت اریاح القضا احباء الله العلی الاعلی و منهم فی الموصل الحدباء و منهم
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
